title: Bilabrella pedicellaris
taxonomy: Bilabrella pedicellaris is classified within the family Aizoaceae and the order Caryophyllales. It is a succulent plant native to South Africa. The classification of Bilabrella pedicellaris is further divided into the genus Bilabrella and species pedicellaris. Bilabrella pedicellaris is closely related to other succulents within the Aizoaceae family. Further research may be needed to confirm its classification in the most recent botanical studies.
uses: Bilabrella pedicellaris has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
